sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27365" key="diplasiepi/tritos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διπλᾰσι-επίτρῐτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, ib. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0358.tlg001:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">22</biblScope></bibl>, Theo Sm.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0358.tlg001:p.110H" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.110H.</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0358.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope> </bibl> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0358.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope> </bibl>/<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0358.tlg001:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3</biblScope> </bibl> <sense id="n27365.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">times as great:</tr_> </sense> </entryFree>
